title: be going to (do)

And then I'm so excited because my mother-in-law is going to teach me how to cook Korean food.

title: will / shall
examples: And then we will fry them.
I'm always so well fed when I visit my in-laws.
And then we will fry them.
I'm always so well fed when I visit my in-laws.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: It's 5.45 am because everything was fully booked and the only departure time we could get was super early.

I can learn how to cook from your mom.

examples: You should learn how to clean from your dad.

title: had better / it's time
examples: And now it's time to eat again.

title: Passive (special: get + p.p.)
examples: I didn't know you'd get married.
